business_impact.summary: Medium technical risk intersects with Medium business criticality.

title: CloudTrail should be enabled and configured with at least one multi-Region trail that includes read and write management events
description: This AWS control checks that there is at least one multi-region AWS CloudTrail trail includes read and write management events. (+1 related finding(s))
what_is_wrong: This AWS control checks that there is at least one multi-region AWS CloudTrail trail includes read and write management events. (+1 related finding(s))
what_the_fix_does: Enables CloudTrail so account activity is logged for audit and detection.

findings.title: CloudTrail should be enabled and configured with at least one multi-Region trail that includes read and write management events
CloudTrail should be enabled and configured with at least one multi-Region trail that includes read and write management events

recommendation.rationale: Matrix cell risk_medium__criticality_high maps to default recommendation 'pr_only'. Risk is medium and business criticality is high. Criticality evidence: data_sensitivity=0.55, privilege_level=1.00, internet_exposure=0.00, matched_signals=none. Relationship context is incomplete, so the recommendation remains conservative and advisory unless policy overrides it. Current execution surfaces stay PR-only, so this recommendation remains advisory until the reviewed bundle is applied.

execution_guidance.label: Enable CloudTrail logging (guided choices)
execution_guidance.blast_radius_summary: Targets AWS::::Account:696505809372 without intending account-wide mutation.

pre_checks.message: Confirm this change is intended for AWS::::Account:696505809372 in account 696505809372 (eu-north-1).
Confirm the repository, deployment path, and approver that own this infrastructure change before generating the PR bundle.
Provide the required strategy inputs before execution: trail_name, create_bucket_policy, multi_region.
CloudTrail log delivery and retention increase S3 storage and request costs.
This PR bundle requires a log-delivery S3 bucket. Create or identify the bucket and set trail_bucket_name before apply.

execution_guidance.expected_outcome: PR mode produces a reviewable infrastructure change: CloudTrail should be enabled and configured with at least one multi-Region trail that includes read and write management events After merge and apply through your IaC path, Security Hub should reflect the remediated state within 1-6 hours.

post_checks.message: Review the generated bundle or diff, then capture plan and apply evidence after the change is merged through the normal infrastructure workflow.
Verify the completed change only affected the intended resource scope for AWS::::Account:696505809372.
Trigger immediate re-evaluation after the change lands and confirm the action closes without reopening.

rollback.summary: Use this rollback path to revert the infrastructure change through the same reviewed delivery workflow.
notes: Prefer reverting through version control and your normal deployment pipeline so rollback stays auditable.

attack_path_view.summary: Privileged identity path can reach AWS::::Account:696505809372. Medium technical risk intersects with Medium business criticality. The action is already overdue. Safest next step: Enable CloudTrail logging (guided choices) via PR only.
